name: knowledge-engineering
description: Local plugin marketplace for the subagentceo knowledge-engineering repo: code-intelligence (LSP), document tooling (PDF MCP), platform-engineering, and IT-admin workflows.

plugins.name: web-doc-tooling
plugins.description: HTML, TypeScript, and JavaScript language servers (VS Code extracted servers + typescript-language-server) plus the official Model Context Protocol PDF server, for mirroring HTML/PDF documentation pages (e.g. anthropic.com/sitemap.xml). Binaries pinned as repo devDependencies.

plugins.name: platform-engineering
plugins.description: AlloyDB Omni install, Docker MCP profile wiring, Voyage+Turbopuffer+AlloyDB embeddings architecture, and citation/test/outcome discipline.
